title: O Trinity of Blessed Light

metadata.composer: 'O Lux Beata Trinitas' ancient Latin "A Hymnal" (Episcopal), 1916
metadata.lyricist: Ambrose of Milan, 4th Century.  German version by M. Luther, 1543 English translation by John Mason Neale, 1852.
metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2009 Revision.
c_lines: Words: Ambrose of Milan, 4th Century.  German version by M. Luther, 1543.
English translation by John Mason Neale, 1852.
Music: 'O Lux Beata Trinitas' ancient Latin.  Setting: "A Hymnal" (Episcopal), 1916.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2009 Revision.

1.raw_text: O Trini- ty of blessèd light, O Unity of princely might, The fiery sun now goes his way; Shed Thou within our hearts a ray.

2.raw_text: To Thee our morning song of praise, To Thee our evening prayer we raise; O grant us with Thy saints on high To praise Thee through eternity.

3.raw_text: All laud to God the Father be, All praise, eternal Son, to Thee, All glory, as is ever meet, To God the holy Para- clete.
